name: vanillic acid
effects: Traditional uses include skin and respiratory conditions
contraindications: high doses may cause gastrointestinal upset or phototoxic reactions due to hydroquinone.
description: vanillic acid appears in records as a compound reported in adenostoma fasciculatum. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
summary: vanillic acid appears in records as a compound reported in adenostoma fasciculatum. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
